news:news.news:title: Palestinian violence warnings rise amid settler attacks, while Denmark's PM faces government formation challenges after weak election results.
news:news.news:keywords: West Bank settler violence, Danish election results, Ghana slavery compensation, Ukrainian drone incidents, Bolsonaro health news

news:news.news:title: Global stock markets rose amid optimism over a potential Iran peace plan, while concerns about fuel shortages in Europe persist.
news:news.news:keywords: Iran peace plan impact on markets, Europe fuel shortage warnings, AI datacenter construction moratorium, TSA funding issues, prediction markets regulation

news:news.news:title: Mark Zuckerberg and Jensen Huang join Trump's new tech panel focused on AI policy, while Amazon's Big Spring Sale offers significant discounts on various products.
news:news.news:keywords: AI policy advisory panels, Amazon Spring Sale discounts, new technology product launches, Apple age verification updates, electric vehicle market changes

news:news.news:title: March Madness continues with the Sweet 16, while notable coaching changes and player contracts dominate the sports headlines.
news:news.news:keywords: March Madness 2026 updates, coaching changes in college basketball, MLB player contracts, NFL player signings, skiing World Cup results

news:news.news:title: Recent scientific discoveries include new insights into metformin's brain effects, the identification of potential alien life, and the discovery of new deep-sea species.
news:news.news:keywords: metformin brain pathway discovery, X-ray emissions from stars, potential alien life on rocky planets, new deep-sea species, insulin pill advancements

news:news.news:title: High oil prices could lead to a global recession, while geopolitical tensions and local political shifts are impacting various regions.
news:news.news:keywords: global economic outlook, Denmark political situation, Iran conflict implications, Australia EU trade agreement, impact of oil prices on economy

news:news.news:title: TSA workers face uncertainty amid a government shutdown, while Delta Airlines suspends special services for Congress members as funding battles continue.
news:news.news:keywords: TSA funding and government shutdown, Delta Airlines Congress service suspension, impact of Iran war on energy prices, prediction markets regulation, effects of corporate jargon on employee performance

news:news.news:title: Meta faces a $375 million penalty for misleading users about product safety, while Apple and NASA announce significant updates and plans for their technologies.
news:news.news:keywords: Meta's legal issues, NASA's lunar base plans, Apple's Siri updates, OpenAI's project discontinuation, Arm's new CPU for AI

news:news.news:title: Hubert Davis was fired as UNC's basketball coach following an early NCAA tournament exit, while other sports news includes significant player contracts and rule changes.
news:news.news:keywords: coaching changes in college basketball, Tiger Woods return to golf, NBA injury updates, NFL player contracts, MLB player contracts

news:news.news:title: Recent scientific discoveries include advancements in insulin delivery, memory storage, and the behavior of honey bees, alongside significant findings in astronomy and paleontology.
news:news.news:keywords: insulin delivery advancements, honey bee behavior, memory storage in the brain, radiation damage mechanisms, new species discoveries

news:news.news:title: Oil Prices Surge Amid Global Recession Fears as TSA Workers Brace for Shutdown Uncertainty
